patch.value: GH-508: dedupe LegacyNoneCollectionNormalizer tables duplicated between create.ts and update.ts (CodeFactor)

CodeFactor auto-issue GH-508 on commit 28afde59 (PR#506): the CREATE_LEGACY_NONE_COLLECTION_NORMALIZERS and UPDATE_* tables declare byte-identical rows for comment/note/learning/file/test/doc collection flags. Only the dep and test rows differ (update adds disableFlagKey). Extract the shared subset to a common cli module (e.g. alongside LegacyNoneCollectionNormalizer's type) with per-command extension for the update-only keys. Ironic origin: PR#506 was the zero-duplication enforcement PR; the jscpd gate evidently does not cover this shape or these paths.

Shared normalizer rows (comment/note/learning/file/test/doc) extracted to one module consumed by both create.ts and update.ts, preserving update-only disableFlagKey entries (replaceDeps/replaceTests); CodeFactor duplicate-code finding for create.ts:335-362 vs update.ts:260-287 clears; GH-508 closed
